predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: leaves_ascendants
predicates.description: The person leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: leaves_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The person leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The person leaves ascendants or close collaterals.

predicates.name: is_share_in_common_estate_of
predicates.description: The asset is the share of the person in the common estate.

predicates.name: is_share_in_exclusive_undivided_estate_of
predicates.description: The asset is the share of the person in the estate exclusively in undivided co-ownership between the spouses.

predicates.name: is_other_asset_of_own_estate_of
predicates.description: The asset is an other asset of the person's own estate.

predicates.name: is_asset_subject_to_legal_return
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal return referred to in article 4.24 or 4.25.

predicates.name: provided_otherwise_in_deed_of_donation
predicates.description: It is provided otherwise in the deed of donation regarding the asset.

predicates.name: provided_otherwise_in_will
predicates.description: It is provided otherwise in the will regarding the asset.

predicates.name: provided_otherwise_for_legal_return
predicates.description: It is provided otherwise in the deed of donation or in the will regarding the asset.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership
predicates.description: The person acquires full ownership of the asset.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct
predicates.description: The person acquires usufruct of the asset.
